tooling_sandboxing.detail: Custom Python components, the Python Interpreter node, and CSV Agent execute arbitrary Python directly in the host Langflow backend process with full filesystem/network access and no per-user isolation by design.

context_memory.detail: Memory bases are per-flow vector stores that auto-ingest conversation messages and persist context across sessions, on top of session-ID-scoped chat memory and optional external Mem0/Redis backends.

lifecycle_hooks.detail: The beta Policies component wraps tools in a ToolGuard generated from natural-language business rules that "runs before tool execution," blocking calls that violate policy, alongside a separate Guardrails component that validates input before it flows downstream.

prompt_optimization.detail: Prompt Template components feed a Language Model's System Message input and expose curly-brace template variables sourced from other components or global variables; there is no automatic prompt-tuning mechanism.

build_vs_buy.label: blueprint
build_vs_buy.detail: Repo installs the open-source, self-hostable (pip/Docker) visual flow builder; DataStax Langflow is a separate fully-managed cloud version of the same OSS foundation offered as a hosted alternative.
